01 — About

Where Story
meets Strategy

I'm a Digital Marketing Specialist with a deep passion for visual storytelling and content creation. After completing an intensive scholarship at ITI, I channel that energy into campaigns that genuinely connect with audiences.

My background spans entrepreneurship — co-founding an experiential entertainment business and education, giving me a unique lens on how to engage people and build brands that feel human.

Whether it's a TikTok strategy, a hologram campaign, or a landing page built from scratch I bring creativity and precision to everything I do.

NEITH
Modest Activewear — Empowered Movement

Audience: Muslim women, age 22–35
Role: Copywriter, Brand Voice
Platform: Instagram
Why "Neith"?

Why NEITH? In ancient Egypt, Neith was the symbol of fine textiles. Just as they cherished quality and craft, we honor that tradition using bamboo grown along the banks of the Nile, for fabric that tells a story of heritage and care.

Overview
Product
Bamboo activewear sets designed for modest coverage & comfort
Problem
Hard to find gym clothes that are both modest and functional
Approach
Heritage-driven storytelling with funnel-specific CTAs
Brand Story
The Narrative

I didn't just write copy — I built a voice. Every post connected the Egyptian goddess Neith's warrior spirit to modern women who refuse to compromise between modesty and movement.

The challenge was real: most modest activewear is either uncomfortable or unfashionable. Neith's bamboo sets solved that. My job was to make that solution unmissable.

Selected Posts

A curated collection of Instagram posts for NEITH — capturing the brand's essence through authentic storytelling, modern aesthetics, and community-driven narratives.

01

The Mystery Begins

"اللغز لسه ما اتحلش... تابعونا واكتشفوا: مين نيث؟ 🔍"

An intriguing teaser campaign that sparks curiosity and anticipation around the NEITH brand launch. This opening post sets the stage for the complete story.

Brand Teaser Coming Soon Activewear
#ComingSoon #StayTuned #EgyptianBrand
02

Heritage Redefined

"نيث مش مجرد لبس رياضي... ده تراث متوارث من سنين. اعملي فولو وكملي الحكاية بنفسك."

Connecting NEITH to Egypt's rich cultural heritage, this post positions the brand as more than activewear—it's a modern expression of timeless values.

Brand Heritage Cultural Connection Storytelling
#Sportswear #Heritage #EgyptianCulture
03

Confidence Uncompromised

"مش محتاجة تلبسي لبس فوق اللبس عشان تداريه! ادخلي على اللينك اللي في البايو واختاري أكتر sets عجباكي."

Empowering women to embrace their bodies with NEITH's inclusive activewear. This post drives conversions while celebrating confidence and self-expression.

Empowerment Product Launch CTA
#Activewear #WomenEmpowerment #FitnessFashion
04

The Ritual Refined

"كلنا عارفين الحركة دي… كل شوية تعدلي اللبس وتتأكدي إن كل حاجة تمام. ادخلي دلوقتي على موقعنا وشوفي الكوليكشن اللينك في البايو."

Relatability meets functionality. This post speaks to the everyday ritual many women experience, positioning NEITH as the solution to comfort and style.

Relatability Product Benefits Conversion
#Sportswear #GymWear #WorkoutStyle

Campaign Strategy

This four-post sequence builds a complete brand narrative—from mystery to heritage to empowerment to everyday ritual. Each post is strategically timed to educate, engage, and convert an audience of women seeking authentic, modest activewear.

Content Calendar Narrative Arc Audience Engagement Brand Voice
Engagement Goals 4x Growth
Reach per Post 1K+ Views
Content Type Lifestyle × Product × Story
